title: dryopteris varia subsp. setosa
intro: Dryopteris varia subsp. setosa, also known as the Setose Wood Fern, is a subspecies of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus, characterized by its unique setose fronds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris varia subsp. setosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in tea, tincture, and extract forms, often used to create natural remedies for various health conditions.
